# opnsense_trust_ca (Resource)

Manages an internally-generated (self-signed) Certificate Authority on OPNsense. Referenced by other resources (e.g. `opnsense_openvpn_instance.ca`) via the computed `refid`.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `description` (String) Human-readable name for the CA.

### Optional

- `common_name` (String) Certificate common name. Changing forces recreation.
- `country` (String) Two-letter country code. Changing forces recreation.

### Read-Only

- `certificate` (String) The generated CA certificate (PEM).
- `id` (String) UUID of the CA.
- `lifetime` (Number) Validity in days (assigned by OPNsense).
- `refid` (String) OPNsense reference id, used by other resources to reference this CA.
- `valid_from` (String) Certificate validity start.
- `valid_to` (String) Certificate validity end.
